text: Add feature to allow operator with slash command to add items to a queue in the .intercom folder in ACP model.  Items are added as numbered items.  Operator can later have those items read back and then instruct the agent to transfer specific numbered items to the work queue of the backlog tool of choice (backlog-md, backlogit, etc).  Operator can replace the text of specific numbered items in the queue.
F.4 follow-up (PR #18 review P1): add file-lock to the .intercom numbered-queue repo (src/persistence/intercom_queue_repo.rs) for concurrent-write safety.
F.4 follow-up (PR #18 review P1/P2): improve '/arc queue transfer <n>' partial-failure error message and add transfer test coverage.
F.2 follow-up (PR #19 review P1): add Slack-client mock test infra to cover handle_wait_action proactive thread-detection path in wait.rs.
